title: Fur Coat
description: Upon pickup, mark [blue]7[/blue] random combats. Enemies in those rooms have [blue]1[/blue] HP.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: This relic marks 7 random combat rooms in the current act upon pickup. When combat starts in one of these marked rooms, all enemies have their HP set to 1. The marked rooms persist for the duration of the act.
